name: FDA Newsroom
notes: Best for approvals, regulatory actions, safety updates, and official product milestones.

name: NIH News Releases
notes: Strong upstream signal for translational science, funded breakthroughs, and trial readouts.

name: ClinicalTrials.gov
notes: Primary source for trial status changes, endpoints, and study design details.

name: PubMed
notes: Primary literature layer for discovery papers and preclinical or clinical publications.

name: Nature Biotechnology
notes: High-value journal source for platform innovation, modalities, and translational work.

name: Nature Medicine
notes: Useful for translational and clinical medicine developments with strong scientific signal.

name: NEJM
notes: Strong source for clinical practice-changing studies and trial publications.

name: EMA News
notes: European regulatory updates, approvals, safety reviews, and committee decisions.

name: NCI News & Events
notes: National Cancer Institute updates with a strong signal for cancer research, clinical developments, and official press releases.

name: STAT Biotech
notes: Useful for context on biotech strategy, financing, leadership, and sector reactions.

name: AstraZeneca Press Releases
notes: Company press releases covering approvals, trial results, pipeline milestones, and corporate updates.

name: Merck & Co. Media
notes: Official Merck & Co. media and news releases page for pipeline, regulatory, research, and corporate updates.

name: Pfizer Press Releases
notes: Official Pfizer press releases page for approvals, trial updates, pipeline milestones, and corporate announcements.
